script_text: The same story can be told in different ways.
Different authors. Different pictures. Sometimes different endings!
Let us see what stays the same.
Cinderella has been told all over the world.
Some versions have a fairy godmother. Some have a magic fish!
The main story is the same. The details change.
What is the same? The main characters. The big problem.
What is different? The setting. The small parts. The ending sometimes.
Both ways can be fun in their own way!
Make two lists. Same on one, different on the other.
Now you are ready to compare different story versions!
